programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A three-year-old develops a respiratory condition. His father has Alzheimers. An investigator reveals that their ill health is due to mold in their modern home.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A murder investigation in Florida crosses jurisdictions from New York and Jamaica. The police rely on cell phone mapping, wiretapping and a host of forensic evidence to link a suspect to a murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A woman convicted of killing her mother in a car fire is granted a new trial. An expert witness has a different opinion as to how the fire started and, if proven, would clear the woman of any culpability.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Authorities track a kidnapper who let his victim write a last will and informed the family of her murder. A phone number written on a previous page left a lasting impression, which helped to convict.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A man dies in his home after a long history of heart disease. A few weeks after the funeral, rumors surface that the death was no accident.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1999, a 12-year-old was found murdered in her Minnesota home. Despite a meticulous search of the home and an exhaustive investigation, police had no suspects.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1962, the small town residents of Hanford, California lost their sense of peace when one of their own, 15-year-old Marlene Miller, was murdered.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A mother of two vanishes after a shopping trip. Her body is discovered a month later, and witnesses say they saw the victim being forced into a car by an unknown person.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A woman is shot to death in her store just one day before she is to testify against the man accused of robbing her. The robber becomes the prime suspect, but he has a solid alibi: a timestamped videotape of his activities on the day of the murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1993, the state of Florida was known for more than just Disney World. Worldwide attention focused on a rash of robberies which targeted tourists. Some vacationers were killed in these attacks, but some fought and survived.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Investigators find a shoe print, several foreign hairs and unknown fingerprints at a murder scene. But they believe the most telling piece of evidence is the bite mark on the victim's chest.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A woman's death in Pennsylvania triggers a homicide investigation into another woman's death in North Carolina. Faced with striking similarities, examiners must determine if their suspect's story about accidental drowning is all wet.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A 34-year-old nurse experiences a variety of flu-like symptoms. None of her doctors are able to discover the cause, until she visits her gynecologist for a routine check-up.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Time of death becomes pivotal after a pregnant woman is found murdered in her air-conditioned bedroom. A striking similarity between her death and an HBO movie gives examiners the clues they need to thaw out the alibi of a cold-blooded killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Wrong Foot
programme.desc: Police were puzzled by an obscure print found at a crime scene where one man had been killed and two teenage girls were seriously injured. Neither of the girls could identify their attacker, but one simple clue helped track the footsteps of a killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Order Up
programme.desc: A man is found dead in his home and his ex-wife has a perfect alibi. To determine time of death, investigators need to know when the victim ate his last meal. An endocrinologist, a forensic botanist and a short-order cook answer their question.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Soon after organizing a workers' strike, a union official is executed in his home. Neither his wife nor anyone in the neighborhood hear any gunshots. It takes a forensic sound test, an electron microscope and a nightgown to explain why.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Welcome Intrusion
programme.desc: A man tells police he shot an intruder who had attacked and murdered his wife. The husband paints a tragic picture and is dubbed a hero. Four years later, forensic evidence leads police to re-examine the motives of this so-called hero.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Within Arm's Reach
programme.desc: A police officer accused of killing his estranged wife insists she committed suicide. Investigators say it was murder — that it was physically impossible for the woman to have shot herself.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Firefighters find an entire family dead inside their home in an apparent murder-suicide, but there are several inconsistent clues in the rubble. Could ballistics, a time card and some secret audiotapes unravel the mystery?

programme.title: Forensic Files: Brotherhoods
programme.desc: Two men are murdered while sleeping in their beds. The next night, arson destroys a family planning clinic. Investigators wonder whether some shards of glass, paint chips and a chicken feather could link what appear to be two separate crimes.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Investigators are baffled after finding a murder scene devoid of any physical evidence, but they suspect that the victim's dog had witnessed the crime. If so, forensic scientists would have to find some way to learn what the dog had seen.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A young TV news producer is raped and murdered in her apartment. Police identify two suspects, but both are cleared of any wrongdoing. When the case stalls for more than a year, investigators turn to the Commonwealth of Virginia's DNA Databank.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Police are dispatched to the scene of a shooting and discover the victim's husband is one of their own: a homicide detective who says his wife accidentally shot herself in the head.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: For years, a woman suffered from what appeared to be the unpleasant side effects of lithium, a drug prescribed to treat bipolar disorder. When she died, investigators had to determine if her death was due to natural causes, suicide or murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A woman is found dead in a ravine, and crucial evidence has been washed away by severe thunderstorms. Twice, the trail turns cold. Almost 20 years later, an old hat and a chip of stainless steel brings the killer to justice.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When an 11-year-old girl disappears from a remote Alaska town, investigators wonder if she has been attacked by a bear or become lost in the dense woods. Eventually, they realize that neither assumption is true.

programme.title: Mighty Morphin Power Rangers
programme.desc: This may be Rita's most diabolical play yet. She sends to Earth five exact replicas of the Power Rangers. These Rangers are evil, and they soon frame the real Power Rangers with their wrong doings.

programme.title: Mighty Morphin Power Rangers
programme.desc: The city gathers at Angel Grove Park for a Power Ranger celebration, the Mayor wants to thank the Rangers for their heroics in defending the city from Rita's attacks.

programme.title: Mighty Morphin Power Rangers
programme.desc: The Zords are recharging after taking a fierce beating from Cyclopsis. Lokar and Cyclopsis set forth to destroy Angel Grove. Zordon warns the teens that their Zords will not be ready for another twelve hours.

programme.title: Mighty Morphin Power Rangers
programme.desc: When the teens go to the park to plant saplings for their science project, Rita sends down Squatt to plant her evil Octoplant. Bulk and Skull, who are nearby, are scared by Squatt and run into a portable bathroom which is picked up by a dump truck.

programme.title: Mighty Morphin Power Rangers
programme.desc: It's the return of Pudgy Pig! When the Power Rangers participate in Angel Grove’s Adopt a Pet day, a little old lady leaves them her pet pig, Norman.

programme.title: Mighty Morphin Power Rangers
programme.desc: Billy, who has an aversion toward fish, picnics at the park pond with Kimberly while the others go scuba diving. Aware of Billy's weakness, Rita creates her poisonous Goo Fish monster to destroy the Rangers.

programme.title: Mighty Morphin Power Rangers
programme.desc: The teens compete in their high school Oddball Games and win the coveted Noble Lion Trophy.

programme.title: Mighty Morphin Power Rangers
programme.desc: When the Power Rangers go up to Billy's uncle's mountain resort to study for their science test, Goldar seizes the opportunity of having them altogether to call on the Crystal of Nightmares.

programme.title: Mighty Morphin Power Rangers
programme.desc: While the teens are discussing the sad possibility that Ernie may have to close down the Youth Center due to financial problems, Jason shows up with an adorable stray dog.

programme.title: Mighty Morphin Power Rangers
programme.desc: The class project is a time capsule and all our power teens bring something significant to class to share with future generations. Mrs. Appleby contributes a photo of the Power Rangers, which makes Rita immensely jealous.

programme.title: Mighty Morphin Power Rangers
programme.desc: Trini is having some difficulties learning the Praying Mantis technique from kung fu expert, Master Lee. He assures her that her technique will improve with time and with some additional practice.

programme.title: Mighty Morphin Power Rangers
programme.desc: When all of the Power Rangers’ parents gather at the Youth Center for Parents Day, Rita seizes the opportunity to create the "Dramole Monster" which traps all the parents in her Dimension of Darkness.

programme.title: Mighty Morphin Power Rangers
programme.desc: Tommy, the Rangers’ only hope, is teleported to the Command Center by Alpha. Zordon reveals that he can restore Tommy's power by draining his own energy and infusing it into Tommy.

programme.title: Mighty Morphin Power Rangers

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: El Chef Ramsay pide un voluntario para cambiar de bando. La dinámica del grupo cambia a medida que los equipos enfrentan su próximo desafío: crear cuatro platos con veinte ingredientes específicos.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: En el desafío de apertura, los dos equipos compiten en una carrera de relevos. Los ganadores tienen lecciones de surf, mientras que los perdedores deben limpiar Hell's Kitchen de arriba a abajo.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: El Chef Ramsay inspira a los seis concursantes, llevándolos al restaurante que administrará el ganador de esta temporada. El ganador de la temporada 3, Rock Harper, hace una aparición especial.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: El Chef Ramsay ordena a los cinco Chefs restantes a que enseñen a amas de casa con problemas en la cocina a preparar una comida gourmet. El ganador recibe consejos culinarios de los Chefs Mark Peel y Ben Ford.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: Los últimos cuatro participantes preparan un almuerzo para los invitados sorpresa: ochenta delicadas madres embarazadas. El Chef que tenga el plato preferido gana un boleto de compras de $1,000. Mientras los demás deben limpiar.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: El Chef Ramsay prepara un desayuno para los Chefs restantes y luego les pide que reproduzcan el plato. Más tarde, Ramsay sabotea la cena para ver cómo reaccionan los competidores ante la adversidad.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: Los dos finalistas visitan el restaurante del Chef Ramsay en Nueva York, donde los Chefs ejecutivos de otros restaurantes de Ramsay encuentran que sus platos son únicos.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: La cuarta temporada llega a su fin con los finalistas trabajando junto a los competidores previamente eliminados para el servicio de cena final.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: Dieciséis Chefs profesionales compiten por un puesto de Chef ejecutivo en el Borgata Hotel, Casino and Spa en Atlantic City. Los participantes deben sorprender al Chef Ramsay con sus platos originales.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: Después del desastre en la cena de la noche anterior, el Chef Ramsay le presenta a los concursantes la comida que desperdiciaron.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: Los catorce Chefs restantes visitan una carnicería para aprender sobre varios cortes de carne y luego ponen en práctica sus conocimientos. Hell's Kitchen se convierte en la noche en un asador.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: Se espera que los trece Chefs restantes sirvan el desayuno a cincuenta jóvenes futbolistas y porristas. Sin embargo, un equipo se queda sin huevos.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: Los doce candidatos restantes compran en un mercado asiático y preparan platos de fusión para el Chef Ramsay y la escritora de cocina Tanya Steel.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: Los once Chefs restantes cocinan para un bar mitzvah, preparando variaciones gourmet de los tres favoritos del invitado de honor.

programme.title: I Love Lucy

programme.title: I Love Lucy

programme.title: I Love Lucy

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego emprende en un nuevo negocio con pulgas, mientras que el Abuelo y Jonathan son tomados como rehenes por unos crimínales en un asalto al banco.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego recibe la sorpresa que después de una muchos años de crímenes su papá le deja un jugoso botín como herencia, mientras que Jonathan y Ortega buscan a un adulto que los lleve a la premier de la película del momento.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego se enamora de la estatua de cera de Ivanka Trump y toda la familia decide hacer un viaje y atravesar todo el país en auto hasta Nueva York.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Una persona del pasado del Abuelo reaparece en su vida. El Noruego tiene problemas dentales.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Gaspar y el Abuelo sufren un accidente en el desayuno que les trae muchos problemas. Mientras Jonathan necesita el apoyo de su familia para una presentación en la escuela.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo consigue una ocupación donde se siente como pez en el agua, mientras que Peluzín entra en un proyecto experimental que le traerá muchos problemas a todos.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Despúes de una ardua búsqueda el Noruego encuentra a su padre, mientras que Jonathan ayuda a Peluzín a llevar una vida de bien.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Olaf se lleva una sorpresa muy desagradable al estar instalando su altar de muertos, mientras que el Abuelo se burla de Gaspar frente a toda su oficina lo que ocasiona una guerra entre ambos.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Pelúzín se roba un paquete de la puerta de Don Sebas, volteando a todo el edificio de cabeza, mientras Jonathan, cansado del bullying del Abuelo decide darle una lección.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego busca desesperadamente una forma para recuperar su fortuna, mientras que el Abuelo se hace adicto al videojuego de moda.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Los del Barrio llegan a su edificio y se dan cuenta que está rodeado por un gran muro que les impide la entrada.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo se topa un con Genio quien le conceda varios deseos, mientras que el Noruego decide lanzarle una fiesta sorpresa de cumpleaños a Olaf para que recupere su infancia perdida.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Las noticias anuncian que un meteorito chocará contra la tierra, acabando con todos los seres vivientes. Los Del Barrio se preparan para el Apocalipsis.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego milagrosamente logra que le den un crédito bancario, mientras que Peluzín se aprovecha de una muerte reciente dentro del edificio para su beneficio económico.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Tenta-Culo celebra su aniversario y hace una gran fiesta donde invita a todos, desafortunadamente durante el evento sucede un crimen y nadie puede salir hasta encontrar al responsable.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Gaspar cansado de la ineficiencia y corrupción decide postularse como servidor público, mientras que Irma es grabada en una situación incómoda, convirtiéndose en una celebridad.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Una aparición religiosa se manifiesta en el baño del departamento y poco tardan el noruego y el abuelo en encontrarle una ventaja a esta situación.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego recibe una visita inesperada con una noticia que le cambiara la vida. Mientras tanto Jonathan le ayuda a Peluzín para prepararse para una prueba muy importante.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo entra en el mundo de la actuación y Peluzín es arrestado.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Un extraño virus se empieza a propagar, infectando a todos en el edificio, mientras que el Abuelo y Jonathan buscan revivir a Irmita después de que Peluzín la deja en coma.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego y Peluzin empiezan un Boy Band, Gaspar se ve forzado a integrarse por problemas económicos. El Abuelo intenta comenzar una relación amorosa.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego sigue con su plan de casarse con la Ivanka de cera, mientras que el Abuelo y Peluzín afianzan su relación después de su gran viaje

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo y Peluzín buscan lucran aprovechando el próximo paro de agua en la ciudad, mientras que el Noruego nos revela por fin después de tanto tiempo el porque de su miedo al baño.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego se topa con un niño de la calle con quien supuestamente mantiene un parentesco mientras que Peluzín organiza un negocio piramidal para aprovecharse de todos los del edificio

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego cansado de que todo mundo lo busque solo por su dinero busca a Pitipú para que le ayude a idear un plan, mientras que Peluzín se embarca en el mundo de la robótica.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Un incidente hace que Irma revalore su vida y desaparezca. Mientras el Abuelo y el Noruego tratan de encontrarla, Gaspar y Jonathan tratan de encontrarle su lugar a Olaf en la familia.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego lleva a Jonathan al museo de antropología por encargo de su escuela y se da cuenta que un personaje del Calendario Azteca se parece mucho a él.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: A wealthy shipping magnate and also a bachelor, Onabes' final voyage is nothing short of extravagant, with a ship full of beautiful women and fine art. Things go as planned when Lupin infiltrates the ship disguised as a woman…

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin is in Hong Kong for a vacation when he is asked to find a woman in return for helping him escape from Inspector Zenigata. Lupin discovers the pickpocket who stole his wallet is the daughter of the woman he is looking for…

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: The Sleeping Lion, a statue made of solid gold, is being transported to a museum by a specially armored, airtight car. Lupin steals the armored car together with the statue and nearly asphyxiated Inspector Zenigata inside.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin manages to steal crime boss Mulligan's precious jewels, only have them stolen from him by Fujiko! Mulligan, unaware that Fujiko has his jewels, hires a skilled gunman named Hangman to take them back from Lupin.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin has been put on auction at the Wanted Club and Dr. Mad places the winning bid. Dr. Mad also purchases Fujiko and Jigen from the auctions. The three are abandoned on a deserted island with killer cyborgs.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin has his eyes on the royal family's Imperial State Crown, but thanks to Scotland Yard's Inspector Dover, stealing it won't be easy.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin announces he's going to steal the betting takes at the Kentucky Derby, but the heist fails. However, it's all part of the plan. Lupin's main target is really the Metropolitan Bank's underground vault.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: After several divorces and a couple of deceased husbands, Jacqueline has amassed a fortune and a collection of impressive jewels. In a twist of fate, Lupin and Jacqueline become close... Too close for Jigen and Goemon's comfort…

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: An illicit auction selling smuggled treasures is taking place. Lupin targets the auction. In the process, Lupin discovers the auctioneer is Cornelia, the woman he once loved who died saving his life…

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin is reunited with Cornelia, a woman who died by her father's hands to save Lupin's life. However, Cornelia's memories of Lupin have been erased. Her father is Dr. Zel, a Nazi who has succeeded in resurrecting corpses and controlling them.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Fujiko discovers that the Holy Scripture for Immortality is hidden within the jungles of Thailand. However, Emmanuelle Poirot, a cold-hearted beauty, is after them too.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Phantoma Mark III, grandson of the mysterious master thief and disguise artist Phantoma, who terrorized Europe during his heyday, is plotting to take over the world…

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: The aging Inspector Hanshichi Mikawa, who failed to capture Lupin 10 years ago, is viewed as a nuisance by his peers at the downtown police station. Lupin has announced he'll be stealing the golden Kannon statuette.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin and his gang have stolen the "36 Views of Mt. Fuji," a famous series of 46 woodblock prints, from the exhibition hall. However, a gang calling itself the Shiranami Five challenges Lupin head-on by stealing one of the prints from him.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Goemon, siding with the Shiranami Five, challenges Lupin to a one-on-one duel. While Goemon keeps Lupin busy, the Shiranami Five steals the 36 Views, but one of its members, Kikuko Benten, betrays her gang and escapes with the loot.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: On a wild whim, Inspector Zenigata swipes a throwing coin owned by his great Edo-era ancestor, Heiji Zenigata while he's viewing the inside of an incredible new safe protected by Professor Hunter's super computer.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin and Jigen are after the Aurora Droplet, a diamond adorning a prima ballerina's tiara. During the heist, Jigen is wounded and in a twist of fate, is saved by Monica, the prima ballerina.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: After shaking off Inspector Zenigata's pursuit, Lupin is stopped by a monstrously huge Fujiko on his way home! The giant Fujiko turns out to be an illusion created by Madame X. Lupin learns Madame X's hobby is collecting famous people.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Bandit leader Basara is determined to sniff out the location of the diamonds Lupin has hidden somewhere in India. Armed with his sinister invention, the Suicide Ray Gun, he tries to make Lupin talk, even trying his luck with a fake Fujiko.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Trouble is all but guaranteed when a crime boss and an arms merchant join hands. The two set their eyes on Goemen's sword, which can split a tank in half! After hiring Fujiko to steal it, they transform the sword into an invincible flying weapon of war.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Jigen and Gomen have sent a letter saying they are being held captive in a small but terrifying village. Lupin arrives in the village to rescue them, but Jigen and Goemon are acting oddly.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Don Kecchi, the wealthiest man in America, is terminally ill and has announced that he's donating his entire fortune to charity. However, Lupin steals Kecchi's money and shoots Fujiko right in front of Inspector Zenigata!

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Margaret Tiffany, the owner of Tiffany's and a TV anchor, hires Lupin and his gang to rob her jewelry store on live TV. Initially, Lupin refuses, but ends up having to go through with it thanks to Fujiko's wild spending habits.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: A princess of a small Silk Road country has been kidnapped. Lupin and his gang are persuaded to rescue Princess Yasmin in exchange for a stomach full of holy curry meant for the gods. However, the kidnapping was a trap to lure Lupin.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Here comes Beauty, the assassin hired by ICPO Headquarters to knock off Lupin! Overwhelmed by Beauty's powerful DumDum bullets, Lupin narrowly escapes with his life thanks to Jigen's quick thinking.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin and his gang head to the isolated country of Kimasan, after hearing the country possesses mountains of treasure. They sneak across the border but are quickly captured by Kinkaku and Ginkaku, the giants who rule the country.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Casino Paradise is an artificial island owned and operated by Domino, a casino tycoon. Domino decides to run for President and brags that with $500 million to spend, the only way he can lose is if Lupin steals his campaign funds!

programme.title: Great Games
programme.desc: 10/14/2021: The Dodgers beat the Giants, 2-1, in Game 5 of the 2021 National League Division Series thanks to an RBI single from Cody Bellinger in the top of the 9th inning and an unlikely save from Max Scherzer.

programme.title: Great Games
programme.desc: 10/15/2021: Jose Altuve ties the game with his 20th career postseason homer, then Carlos Correa hits a go-ahead shot in the 7th inning to lead the Astros to a Game 1 victory over the Red Sox.

programme.title: Great Games
programme.desc: 10/16/2021: Austin Riley leads the way and goes 2-for-4 with a solo home run and a walk-off RBI single, helping the Braves beat the Dodgers in Game 1 of the 2021 National League Championship Series.

programme.title: Great Games
programme.desc: 10/17/2021: Ozzie Albies and Austin Riley come up clutch to tie the game in the 8th inning, then postseason hero Eddie Rosario hits the walk-off single in the 9th to take down the Dodgers in Game 2 of the National League Championship Series.

programme.title: Great Games
programme.desc: 10/19/2021: The Astros take down the Red Sox, 9-2, in Game 4 of the ALCS. With the game tied going into the 9th inning, Houston scores seven runs, highlighted by run-scoring singles from Jason Castro, Yordan Álvarez, Carlos Correa and Kyle Tucker.

programme.title: Mystery Science Theater 3000: The Wild Wild World of Batwoman
programme.desc: In this lower-than-low budget film, Batwoman enlists her band of go-go dancing Batgirls to protect the Atomic Hearing Aid from the rotten Rat Fink.

programme.title: Mystery Science Theater 3000: Mitchell
programme.desc: The trio sit through a dreary Joe Don Baker disasterpiece as Gypsy tries to find a way to save Joel from being killed by the Mads.

programme.title: MST3K: Pod People
programme.desc: A child adopts a large egg which hatches into a mischievous alien, while a group of pop musicians on a wilderness vacation runs into trouble.

programme.title: MST3K Shorts
programme.desc: Advance your career by finishing this enlightening two-part short featuring timeless sales advice.

programme.title: Mystery Science Theater 3000: Monster A-Go-Go
programme.desc: The search for an astronaut on an alien planet.

programme.title: MST3K: Tormented
programme.desc: In Tormented, jazz pianist Tom Stewart, soon to marry the woman he loves, watches former love Vi Mason fall from a lighthouse and does not save her. Vi’s spirit returns and begins to torment Tom at his every step.

programme.title: MST3K Shorts
programme.desc: A high school senior named Sue and her boyfriend want to get married right after Sue graduates. A marriage counselor discourages the young couple from entering into a hasty marriage.

programme.title: Mystery Science Theater 3000: Hamlet
programme.desc: A dour production of Shakespeare’s play produced for German TV. A prince returns home for his father’s funeral and doesn’t like what he finds.

programme.title: MST3K Shorts
programme.desc: A classic newsreel that highlights various winter sports.

programme.title: Mystery Science Theater 3000: The Incredibly Strange Creature
programme.desc: A couple of slackers stumble across a cult of monsters at a carnival and becomes a killing zombie.

programme.title: The Hills
programme.desc: Spencer tries to save his relationship with Heidi by asking her cowboy dad's permission to get married. Lauren must fire Stephanie from People's Revolution, risking their friendship.

programme.title: The Hills
programme.desc: Lauren thinks twice about going to Heidi's wedding after Spencer finally apologizes. Brody refuses to risk his relationship with Jayde to save his friendship with Audrina, and Stephanie confronts Kelly Cutrone.

programme.title: The Hills
programme.desc: In Lauren's final episode, she must decide whether she's willing to forgive Spencer in order to be there for Heidi on the day of her "princess" wedding. The entire cast shows up and is shocked by a guest no one saw coming.

programme.title: The Hills
programme.desc: Kristin Cavallari's attempt to reconnect with her Hollywood friends goes awry when she angers Audrina by hitting on Justin. Heidi and Spencer embark on married life by shopping for a new house.

programme.title: The Hills
programme.desc: After being stood up by Audrina, Kristin decides to stop fighting her attraction to Justin. Heidi volunteers to babysit the next door neighbor, but Spencer wants nothing to do with kids.

programme.title: The Hills
programme.desc: Kristin gets her first taste of being in a relationship with Justin when he doesn't show at Brody's surprise party. Heidi and Spencer disagree about when to start a family, and Audrina goes on a date with Justin's best friend.

programme.title: The Hills
programme.desc: Kristin thinks she has tamed Justin Bobby, but Justin may not be over Audrina just yet. When Holly loses control at an event, it's up to Heidi to make her sister confront her drinking problem.

programme.title: The Hills
programme.desc: Justin plays hard to get with Kristin, but his plan backfires. Holly's drinking leads to an intervention by Heidi and Stephanie. Brody and Jayde get in a fight that leads them to reconsider their relationship.

programme.title: The Hills
programme.desc: Justin finds himself in hot water after Kristin and Audrina finally meet face-to-face. All Heidi wants for her birthday is a baby, but Spencer has something else in mind.

programme.title: The Hills
programme.desc: Kristin and Brody consider dating again. Audrina and Justin meet to discuss their future, but it doesn't end the way she hoped. Spencer takes the most drastic measure yet in his ongoing war with Heidi over starting a family.

programme.title: The Hills
programme.desc: Kristin clashes with Jayde when she comes back to reclaim Brody. Heidi hatches a plan to get pregnant with or without Spencer's consent; Audrina copes with the fact that Justin still has feelings for Kristin.

programme.title: The Hills
programme.desc: A wild weekend in Las Vegas makes Kristin wonder if she has real feelings for Justin. Spencer comes up with a plan to find out if Heidi has stopped taking her birth control.

programme.title: The Hills
programme.desc: Kristin decides she doesn't want a relationship with Justin. Audrina finally frees herself from Justin. Brody gets cold feet when Jayde wants to move in with him, and Spencer sweats the possibility Heidi might be pregnant.

programme.title: La venganza de los ex VIP: No soportas, ¿verdad?
programme.desc: Lalo viene a terminar los pendientes con Leslie y a Isaac le toca atacarse. Lizbeth explota contra Isaac y Rufas. Yurgenis se libera en un catamarán, sin la sombra de Brandon. El nuevo ex llega muy salsa, pero de la que no pica.

programme.title: La venganza de los ex VIP: El jaque mate
programme.desc: Ana saborea el plato de la venganza, mientras que Leslie se limpia las lágrimas con su orgullo. Un divertido día de playa se convierte en una pesadilla. La llegada del nuevo ex cambia el juego y La Divaza tira los dados cuando no es su turno.

programme.title: La venganza de los ex VIP: Veo, veo y no veo claro
programme.desc: La Divaza decide quién debe abandonar la villa. Carolina no controla su ira y le desacomoda las extensiones a Yurgenis. Isaac respeta su condición y va por su próxima conquista. La tablet del terror desata una nueva oleada de discusiones.

programme.title: Súper Shore
programme.desc: Esteban está de mal humor y nadie entiende por qué, su amistad con Fernando pende de un hilo y eso genera tensión en el grupo. Mientras tanto de Italia le llega una sorpresa enorme a Abraham.

programme.title: Súper Shore
programme.desc: Mientras los chicos se encuentran en una fiesta, aparece sorpresivamente una amiga italiana de Abraham que provocará un gran conflicto de regreso a la casa. El verano Marbellí está que arde y el calor parece afectar las emociones de todos.

programme.title: Súper Shore
programme.desc: La relación entre Igor y Talía cada vez se hace más intensa y amorosa y por supuesto esto a Arantxa no le cae nada bien y la pone en un lugar caliente, llevando la tensión a toda la casa

programme.title: Súper Shore
programme.desc: Todos contra todos, Electra y Arantxa atacan a Igor, el brasileño ataca a Electra, la casa es un revuelo y encima llega visita que se pone demasiado pesada.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore: placer sin culpa
programme.desc: En este especial podrás ver el recuento de la amistad entre los integrantes de Acapulco Shore durante las 3 temporadas y como se formo esta gran familia.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore: placer sin culpa
programme.desc: Los Shore se caracterizan por armar el mejor desmadre en la costa de Acapulco, así que acompáñanos en este especial que contiene las fiestas más locas de las 3 temporadas.

programme.title: Catfish Colombia
programme.desc: Hace tres años que Henry mantiene una relación en línea con Alejandra. A lo largo de los años ambos han estado hablando en línea y Henry cree que ella es la mujer de sus sueños.

programme.title: Catfish Colombia
programme.desc: Jade conoció a William a través de las redes sociales y descubrió que él en verdad era una popular estrella de las redes sociales. Pero ella teme que detrás de las conversaciones no esté William, porque él se niega a verse con Jade.

programme.title: Are you the one? el match perfecto
programme.desc: El plan de Mario finalmente llega a completarse y pueden ser los últimos momentos de Quetzalli en la casa. En tono de despedida, Eduardo le hace una cálida sorpresa a Quetzalli para enseñar su cariño.

programme.title: Are you the one? el match perfecto
programme.desc: Con las buenas vibraciones de la última noche, Connie acepta trabajar en equipo, lo que pone en prueba las emociones de Clovis. La fiesta se vuelve complicada para Daniel, él necesita elegir entre dos caminos además de jugar con alguien más.

programme.title: La venganza de los ex
programme.desc: Hay un nuevo ex y quiere recuperar a su antigua pareja, pero la cita cambia los planes. Una pareja termina antes sus vacaciones y Spencer se abre con Norma. Rocío hace una visita exprés a la Master Suite. Hay una ceremonia de compromiso.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: The serenity of historic Roanoke Island is shattered when a retired career soldier attempts to prove his late brother’s death was not a hunting accident, but murder.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: When Tony Morgan, a smooth-talking, seemingly perfect son, frames his mother for murder, no one even suspects his involvement. No one except Ben Matlock, who tries to prove the good boy isn’t so good after all.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: Ben Matlock finds himself in an awkward situation when he joins Julie March in Baltimore to help her defend an old friend accused of murder.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: Matlock holds the last ray of hope for a veteran circus clown, Homer Fleming, accused of murdering his partner during a performance.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: Ben Matlock uncovers plots within a plot when Noel Bishop, the wunderkind director of horror films, is accused of murdering motion picture star Catherine McKay as the cameras roll.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: Ben Matlock has serious doubts about a code of ethics among con artists which is never supposed to include murder.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: Ben Matlock accepts the most dangerous case of his career when he agrees to defend an inmate accused of murder – before a kangaroo court in a riot-torn prison.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: Matlock must protect his own life while he’s in prison trying to defend his client. Meanwhile, Conrad tries to unravel the prison murder plot from outside the walls.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: Ben Matlock is left with a lot of questions and no answers when his client, Drew Carey, bolts from the courtroom during a preliminary hearing for murder.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: A deathbed letter from an old friend puts the life of Ben Matlock in peril when he feels morally obligated to reopen a murder case more than three decades old.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: The senseless murder of a toy store owner not only clouds the Christmas spirit, but threatens an annual party and gifts of toys to local orphans.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: A philandering college professor is murdered in his classroom and Marcy Hansen is the prime suspect, having announced her pregnancy in an argument before witnesses.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: Ben Matlock and Michelle Thomas are exposed to a quick course in trash television when a vicious talk show host, Don Galloway, humiliates three prominent women to boost his ratings.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: Ben Matlock is convinced that Alex Gordon, a paraplegic, murdered his wife and framed his business partner, Bret Howell, for the crime.

programme.title: I Didn't Know I Was Pregnant

programme.desc: Korey is positive that his girlfriend Dominique is cheating on him and is also worried that she might be selling sex. She says that his suspicions have caused him to become abusive. Then, Gregory thinks that his girlfriend Robin isn’t faithful!

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: Is My Husband the Abuser?
programme.desc: Did Marlo touch his daughter with Sandra when she was 7? He’s been avoiding confrontation with her for almost 10 years, but today, Sandra won’t leave without the truth nor justice for their child!

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show
programme.desc: Ashley and DeNorris accuse each other of cheating. Later, Jim denies serious allegations with his fiancee's sister and other young girls.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Sarah's here for Jonathan. The only problem is Lana, her best friend, who just happens to be Jonathan's girlfriend. Next Kung-fu family feud! David's here to let his brother, Lil Wayne, know that he has been sleeping with his girlfriend Ashley.

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: El propio hermano de Terrazina, Tyson, cree que Simon no es el padre. ¿Probará Tyson que ella fue infiel y que Simon no es el padre de su hija? Después, William tendrá un acalorado debate con dos mujeres sobre la paternidad de sus hijos.

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: Toni y Quintin regresan para averiguar quién es el padre de su hijo. ¡Esta vez se preguntarán si Toni fue infiel! ¡Jenny tiene que saber si su hijo es de su esposo o de su amiga! Finalmente, ¿Vivian pondrá fin a la búsqueda de su hijo de 30 años?

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: Maurio dice que no es padre de 5 hijos. Cuando se revelen los cinco análisis, ¿se demostrará que tiene razón o será un perdedor? ¡La familia de Jon dice que él no es el padre del bebé de Courtney! ¿Los resultados de la prueba dirán lo contrario?

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: ¿La esposa del pastor Terry lo engañó con 200 hombres diferentes? A continuación, Naomi quiere averiguar si su prometido, Jesse, es un infiel. ¿Qué revelarán los resultados en Maury hoy?

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: Kiki y su hermana Sad-e aseguran que el novio de Kiki, Tavon, es un infiel. ¿Qué dirán cuando aparezca en nuestra cámara oculta? Entonces, ¿los hijos de James y Nikkie son realmente suyos?

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: Keisha sabe que Desmond es el padre de su bebé, ¡pero él la quiere fuera de su vida! Después, dos madres desesperadas se enfrentan al padre de sus tres hijos.

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: La furiosa mamá Patty quiere demostrar que el novio de su hija, Dale, un hombre que duplica la edad de su hija, ha sido infiel. ¿Entonces Bam fue infiel a Brianna en su propia cama?

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: Grace, la madre de Eddie, no los va a dejar vivir con ella a menos que Kay Kay pueda demostrar que su hijo, Eddie, es el padre de su nieto. Después, Troy niega ser el padre de los cinco hijos de Vanessa.

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: ¡Estas mujeres han venido con preguntas urgentes! Kendra quiere que su esposo Richard admita que es el padre de su hijo Y del hijo de su amante! ¡Jevon y su familia no creen que él sea el padre del hijo de Jazmine! ¡Solo MAURY tiene las respuestas!

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: En el episodio de hoy de MAURY, estos hombres dicen que saben que la prueba de paternidad demostrará lo que siempre han sabido: que no son padres de los hijos de las mujeres que los trajeron aquí. ¡Ellas van a demostrar que están equivocados!

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: Centavia sospecha que su novio Richard la engaña con Kheisha, la niñera. Después, Kristy le revelará 2 secretos a su novio Matt que podrían terminar su relación. ¡Descubre estos secretos impactantes hoy!

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: Los huéspedes de MAURY han estado ocultando secretos horribles de sus seres queridos y eso les está desgarrando por dentro. ¡Están listos para confesar, incluso si eso les hace perder sus relaciones! ¿Se quedarán o se irán sus seres queridos?

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: Hoy en MAURY, te pondremos al día con algunos de nuestros invitados más emocionantes. Los resultados de paternidad asombraron a todo el mundo. ¿Qué pasó después de revelar las respuestas y que estos invitados retomaron sus vidas?

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: Rhonda está segura de que John es el padre de su hijo. ¡Incluso la mamá de John está de acuerdo con ella! Después, Kim y Heather solían ser amigas, pero eso fue antes de que Rick la dejara por Heather. Sin embargo, Kim está segura de que Rick es el padre.

programme.title: Amor comprado
programme.desc: Después de firmar el contrato comprometiéndose a casarse con un desconocido millonario, Mariana expresa a su amiga Elena el temor por un futuro incierto al lado de un hombre que no ama.

programme.title: Amor comprado
programme.desc: Willy vengará su dolor con ofensas contra Mariana sabiendo que está a su lado por el interés a su dinero, luego de negarse hasta el cansancio a escuchar sus razones para casarse con él.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Rosaura habla por teléfono con Andrés Bustamante y le cuenta la verdad sobre Camelia. Andrés se muestra desconfiado pero Rosaura le dice que ella no tiene nada que esconder, incluso le dio su nombre.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: En la clínica, tras saber del estado vegetal de Patricio, Estrella toma la decisión de otorgarle su perdón al hombre que en el pasado enloqueció a su madre.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Silvano visita a Rosaura y empieza a explicarle que se ha dado cuenta que siente amor por Jacqueline y que también sabe que Rosaura nunca va a poder olvidar a Luis Mario.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Luis Mario, junto a Rosaura, reciben la felicitación de toda la familia presente por su reconciliación. Luis Mario y Rosaura juntos le dicen a Gabrielita que por fin estarán juntos los tres.

programme.title: Acorralada
programme.desc: Andrés le confiesa a Diana que Deborah es su esposa y que es momento de cobrar venganza contra ella y contra Diana.

programme.title: Acorralada
programme.desc: Deborah le confiesa la verdad a Bruna y le hace saber que quien realmente vivía en esa casa era la verdadera Marfil.

programme.title: Acorralada
programme.desc: Bruna le suplica con desesperación a Deborah que no permita que Marfil sea trasladada al manicomio.

programme.title: Amor comprado
programme.desc: Willy vengará su dolor con ofensas contra Mariana sabiendo que está a su lado por el interés a su dinero, luego de negarse hasta el cansancio a escuchar sus razones para casarse con él.

programme.title: Amor comprado
programme.desc: Mariana lucha entre su amor y su odio por Willy. En vista de la actitud rebelde adoptada por Mariana para regresar con él forzosamente, Willy se decide a confesar la verdad de su situación.

programme.title: Amor comprado
programme.desc: A la llegada de Margot a su apartamento, Willy se ve forzado a convencer a Mariana para que se esconda de su supuesta amiga, para que su abuela no averigüe la verdad de su matrimonio.

programme.title: Amor comprado
programme.desc: Después de su enfrentamiento con Margot, Mariana jura no dejar que su rival le arrebate a Willy y vuelve a leer una vez más su contrato de matrimonio, para darse cuenta de las cláusulas.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Luis Mario y Camelia se van de viaje en el yate pero se presenta en el muelle, Patricio. Camelia lo ve y se queda con la excusa de que dejó la cartera en el carro.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: While heading to the next island, Zou, Luffy's appetite causes them trouble and he and Bartolomeo find themselves entangled in the scheme of a pirate lord who can manipulate silver.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The Tram-Man arrives! And has Luffy, Bartolomeo and Desire on the run! The deeper the three fall into the pit, however, the more clear it becomes that Bill's group hides a terrible secret!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy, Bartolomeo, and Desire make their way up the mineshaft, but Bill's assassin, Peseta, has other plans! Just when the going gets tough, help arrives, and Zoro battles the assassin head on!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy, Desire, and Bartolomeo go up against Bill! But the mad, Smelt-Smelt man becomes deranged and lets his true power unfurl! Do Luffy and the others have any hope of exposing Bill's self-serving aims and turning his gang against him?

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Bartolomeo recounts the formation of the Straw Hats, sharing their moving story with the rest of his crew! Meanwhile, the mysterious island of Zou approaches in the distance, obscured by fog. But when the haze clears, no one is expecting what they see!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy and the others arrive at the mysterious land of Zou, and find the Sunny. But when they board, they find the other Straw Hats have already disembarked. Thus, Luffy, Zoro, Robin and the others take on the challenge of climbing the monstrous elephant!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Finally scaling the elephant's back, the Straw Hats continue their search for the other half of their crew! But the mysterious "island" on the back of the elephant may hold more danger than they bargained for, as they learn they are not alone!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy pushes deeper into the mysterious forest on the elephant's back, but he's treading in territory where is not welcome! Meanwhile, Usopp and the others make a startling discovery in a ruined city!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy and the others survive the Rain-Ruption and learn of its vital role in maintaining life on Zou.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy and the others are unexpectedly welcomed at the fortress and treated well by the Minks, although they have to navigate some cultural differences… And Nami starts sharing what happened to them after they left Dressrosa.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy and the others learn about the dangerous intruders who have come to Zou, and why the island is wrecked! Afterwards, Luffy's loose lips get them into trouble!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Duke Dogstorm - the Straw Hats finally meet the ruler of this strange land, and learn more about the battle that took place here; and the mysterious system by which the island is ruled!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Day turns to night as the Minks keep up their onslaught against the invading Beast Pirates! But Jack's amazing Devil Fruit power may end the elephant island once and for all!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Night and day, Jack faces the fury of the two sworn defenders of Zou, but while they put up a good fight, the Minks aren't able to subdue Jack, especially after he brings out his secret weapon.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: In the aftermath of Jack's deadly attack on the island of Zou, Chopper and Sanji rush in to save the fallen Mink Tribe - but they will need the help of Caesar to overcome the poisonous effects of the gas!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: More of the dramatic happenings on Zou are revealed as we learn that Jack's pirate band were not the only visitors to the elephant island! And what about the mysterious fate of Sanji?

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The mystery of Sanji's disappearance deepens as Luffy learns that Big Mom's lackeys have caught up with him and the rest - and carry with them an invitation from Big Mom that simply can't be refused!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Sanji's dire situation has become clear, but instead of rallying against Big Mom's crew, he submits to go along with them to bring an end to this situation. But being separated from one of his crew is more than Luffy is willing to tolerate!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: There's only one key to finding out what happened to Sanji - and Luffy and the others make their way towards finding out more about their friend's disappearance, but on their way the indigenous fauna give them trouble!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy hatches a plan to help Sanji, but he'll have to go alone to avoid an all-out war with Big Mom. Meanwhile, Kin'emon and Kanjuro finally arrive at Zou, unwittingly setting the stage for the Minks' thirst for revenge!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The samurai have landed! And they make their way into the country of Zou unaware of the welcome they will receive by the Minks!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Revelations abound as the true nature of the Wano clan and their relationship with the Minks is revealed! Momonosuke's role is greater than any had imagined! But even more shocking - the visage of Raizo the Ninja!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The mysteries of ninjutsu enthrall the Straw Hats as Raizo, the implausible ninja, makes his true powers known! Meanwhile, a mysterious artifact points the way towards the end of the Grand Line!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The mystery of the Ponegliffs is revealed - their true significance, and the story of their creation, leads closer to the Straw Hats than they might have imagined!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: More mysteries of the Kozuki Clan are revealed - and the samurai propose an alliance to help topple Kaido! But Luffy's response will shock the crew... and force the young daimyo to take responsibility!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Dogstorm and Cat Viper share their story of being on the journey with Oden and Roger but are interrupted by Nami who is concerned about the sea route. Meanwhile, Jack is plotting to bring down the Mokomo Dukedom again!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The plans are set! The Straw Hats divide and conquer, one group heading to save Sanji, the others to the Land of Wano! But in the final moments before their departure, the tremendous elephant island begins to quake!

programme.desc: A local beauty queen is found dead in a lake; as her small town grieves, law enforcement finds itself on a 20-plus year investigation that leads to a killer who was hiding in plain sight.

programme.title: In Ice Cold Blood
programme.desc: A young woman disappears, leaving the community hoping for her safe return; when she is found murdered, a string of mysterious anonymous tips takes detectives into a toxic world of jealousy and obsession.

programme.title: In Ice Cold Blood
programme.desc: A missing persons case becomes something much darker when a sick, sinister affair is uncovered, leading investigators to believe foul play is involved.

programme.title: In Ice Cold Blood

programme.desc: Coyote and the crew go tide pooling at night and discover three different species of huge sea cucumbers!

programme.desc: Butterfly’s lives are incredible; they’re split into two, with caterpillars and adults acting like two distinct species, so follow Secret Nature, from Caterpillar to Catwalk.

programme.desc: The shelter choppers its ferocious grizzly yearling, Shadow, to a remote, alpine valley for release but then things turn dangerous.

programme.title: Ghost Stories

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: When Matt and Froy go missing, Sonia is on a mission to figure out what they've got up their sleeves.

programme.desc: Matt and Ronnie repo a Porsche from a maniac; Carlos and Ronnie come face to face during their repo of a cable van.

programme.desc: When Ronnie takes the fall for losing their previous repo, Carlos tries to make amends.

programme.desc: The team is ahead of schedule on their Vegas mission, but will it all be derailed when Froy brings unwanted trouble back to the office? Also, Ronnie and Froy run into an unexpected dilemma when a husband's better halves take the reins.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain A Cook's Tour

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain A Cook's Tour
programme.desc: This multi-cultural city is explored through its traditional food.

programme.title: Licence to Grill

programme.title: Gordon's Great Escape
programme.desc: Gordon travels around Northern India to look for more authentic versions of the popular Indian dishes he grew up with, and at the end, has to prove he's learned how to cook some authentic Indian food in front of a foodie crowd in New Delhi.

programme.title: Gordon's Great Escape
programme.desc: Gordon wants to learn more about cuisines of India that aren't normally represented in UK restaurants, so he travels to remote Northeast India to search them out, and open a food cart in Calcutta for a day to prove he's learned something.

programme.title: Gordon's Great Escape

programme.title: Mexico: One Plate at a Time with Rick Bayless
programme.desc: Mexico and chocolate go together like salsa and chips. A few Mexico City chocolatiers see more potential for Mexican chocolate beyond churros. They see single-origin chocolate bars, lovely hand-formed truffles, even ambitious sculptures.

programme.title: Mexico: One Plate at a Time with Rick Bayless

programme.title: Farscape

programme.title: Naked Science
programme.desc: The Earth is built to last. It is a 4,550,000,000-year-old, 5,973,600,000,000,000,000,000-tonne ball of rock and iron. It has taken more devastating asteroid hits in its lifetime than you've had hot dinners, and it still orbits happily around the sun.

programme.title: Naked Science
programme.desc: The Rockies. Magnificent and awe-inspiring mysterious, the Rockies are one of the longest mountain ranges in the world. Naked Science investigates the geological processes that build these massive mountains.

programme.title: Naked Science
programme.desc: Mars our closest neighbor now a lifeless planet – but it may once have had water and therefore life. Naked Science investigates the red planet to learn how it was formed, how it became barren, and ask whether it ever will be possible to colonize it?

programme.title: Space: The New Frontier: Living with Space
programme.desc: Astronauts and Cosmonauts train and study for years to work and live aboard the International Space Station. With this wealth of experience and insight behind them what do they think when they return to Earth?

programme.title: Space: The New Frontier: Sling Shot
programme.desc: Soviet Luna 3 was the first to use gravity to change course to photograph the dark side of the Moon. NASA Mariner 10 used the technique to swing by Venus to target Mercury. The gravity sling shot maneuver has become a standard for space navigation.

programme.title: Space: The New Frontier: Sling Shot
programme.desc: Soviet Luna 3 was the first to use gravity to change course to photograph the dark side of the Moon. NASA Mariner 10 used the technique to swing by Venus to target Mercury. The gravity sling shot maneuver has become a standard for space navigation.

programme.title: Space: The New Frontier: The Astronauts

programme.desc: With low Earth orbit delegated to private companies, NASA is free to develop the deep space hardware for missions to Mars and beyond. The Orion space craft and SLS launch system are well on their way to delivering this capability.

programme.title: Inventions That Shook The World
programme.desc: The first decade of the 1900s ushers in crucial inventions that will help shape the rest of the century. Communication gets a boost as a voice is transmitted wirelessly by radio for the first time.

programme.title: Inventions That Shook The World
programme.desc: Saving lives and taking lives are the hallmarks of the inventions of the 1910s. From charcoal to lightly browned.

programme.title: Inventions That Shook The World
programme.desc: Mobsters, jazz, and turbulent economic times mark the 1920s. Silent film makes the transition to the talkies as sound comes to the silver screen. Criminals find that there's one less place to hide with the invention of the lie detector.

programme.title: Inventions That Shook The World
programme.desc: Though overshadowed by the Great Depression, there is no shortage of ingenuity in the 1930s. The two-way radio gets miniaturized, and the world's first portable walkie-talkie goes on the air.

programme.title: Inventions That Shook The World
programme.desc: War is the driving force behind much of the innovation in the 1940s. The microwave is born after a self-taught inventor realizes that military equipment is responsible for melting a chocolate bar in his pocket.

programme.title: Inventions That Shook The World

programme.title: Inventions That Shook The World

programme.desc: Teal'c and Bra'tac believe the time is right to lead their people in an uprising against the Goa'uld. Their plan suffers a setback when an army of Replicators begins to systematically take control of Goa'uld ships and Jackson is taken prisoner.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1

programme.title: Stargate SG-1

programme.title: Stargate SG-1

programme.desc: Lt. Kenmore wakes up in the infirmary without his memory. He begins to think there is something wrong when his nightmares about being a Wraith seem to be more than real. His fears would be unfounded if not for the serum that turns Wraiths humans.

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis
programme.desc: Sheppard and the team visits the planet Taranis at the invitation of two leading citizens, Dr. Norina Pero and Chancellor Lycus, who want McKay to repair a failing shield generator at an Ancient base, and Ancient warship, they've discovered.

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis
programme.desc: Kenmore arrives back in Atlantis with a group of Wraith, in the midst of a civil war. Kenmore, hoping to leverage his knowledge of Atlantis against Sheppard and the team, suggests a trade; Beckett's serum, in exchange for keeping Atlantis hidden.

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis
programme.desc: After their alliance with the Wraith backfires, the team must find a way to stop two Hive ships that are headed for Earth. Weir orders to attack and Sheppard is forced to rely on Michael to help him save McKay and Ronon, who are being held prisoners.

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis
programme.desc: Successfully using the retrovirus to turn an entire hive ship of Wraith into humans the team returns to Atlantis with their prisoners in stasis. Weir continues to defend her leadership in the face of an independent review being conducted by the IOA.

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis
programme.desc: The team comes across a small village with a revered leader. Beckett soon becomes so enamored by his host he brings him to Atlantis. But soon, McKay discovers that Lucius is using some sort of pheromone to enchant those around him.

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis
programme.desc: Exploring a village, the team is suddenly attacked and taken prisoner as Ronon had unknowingly lured the Wraith there. The villagers set Sheppard and Teyla free, who mobilize a strike force. When they return, the village has been devastated.

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis

programme.title: Charmed
programme.desc: The Charmed Ones face a demon who has been killing leprechauns and stealing their magic. The leprechauns endow the sisters with good luck, which enables Paige to gain material wealth, Phoebe to meet a man, and Piper to book a major star to play P3.

programme.title: Medium

programme.title: Medium

programme.title: Medium

programme.title: Medium

programme.desc: Uncle Fester's pen pal, Madelyn, is coming to visit. Fester panics, as he has described himself as handsome, heroic and romantic. Gomez and Morticia agree that all Fester needs is a toupee and they help him make several styles.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Join Jungle Jack for a journey down south to Florida's Everglades where he meets gators, snakes, and other creatures from the swamp.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Animal Adventures

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Using science as their most powerful weapon, investigators must find these hired killers and make them pay the true price of murder.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: A woman's body is found and investigators have little time and few clues to lead them to a killer who could strike again. Perpetrators try to conceal their crimes, yet savvy investigators can take the most obscure data and recreate a murder.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: When victims of murder know their killers, they are often caught off guard. But even the best-laid plans leave traces of the forsaken trust.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Forensic Botany & Geology: Plants help provide oxygen and nutrients for existence. Soil is the fertilizer of life. Yet both can yield clues to the time and location of a person's death.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Missing Person: Approximately 1.8 million Americans are reported missing each year. Worldwide, the number of missing persons nearly triples.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Sometimes the scales of justice are balanced by just a few milligrams of evidence – a couple of fibers, a tooth filling, or a smudge on a piece of tape. The biggest cases are often solved by the smallest clues.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Terrorism: Thanks to new technology and, perhaps, the approaching millennium, terrorism is a growing international threat. The Oklahoma City explosion and the bombing of the World Trade Center are just two of the incidents of this growing problem.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Most victims of multiple murderers are meticulously chosen because of a mutual connection with the killer or because they match an intricate set of criteria that fits the killer's MO.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: A woman is found dead at the bottom of the basement stairs. As detectives look into the accident, they begin to question the sequence of events.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Philadelphia's Vidocq Society, named after an 18th Century French detective, is one of the world's most unusual crime-solving organizations.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: 911 receives a desperate call in Fort Worth, Texas. A man's wife is shot. Forensic investigators search for clues in unlikely places, hoping the victim herself could provide information needed to determine how and why she died.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Investigators rely on forensic odontology to identify a body from a single tooth and to catch two brutal killers from their bite marks.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Some people will let nothing stand between them and their goals. In their tortured minds, raw desire replaces all reason, and homicide becomes a convenient means to an end.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: New Forensic Techniques used to Solve Old Cases: Advancement in science and technology are encouraging people to revisit the past in hopes of answering questions that have remained unanswered, and solving crimes that seemed unsolvable.

programme.desc: When a horse dealer transporting a prize stallion stops in North Fork, two saddle tramps try to use trickery to obtain it.

programme.title: Hollywood Exes
programme.desc: Jessica invites everyone to her lingerie-themed birthday party. Drea, who still has issues with Jessica, chooses not to attend. This prompts Jessica to confront her in person, during which all hell breaks loose…

programme.title: Hollywood Exes
programme.desc: An emotional Drea reveals the personal struggles she's dealing with back in Chicago, which play a part in her behavior towards Jessica. Meanwhile, Nicole plans a birthday party and expects both Drea and Jessica to attend.

programme.title: Hollywood Exes

programme.desc: Still in Park City, Nicole feels compelled to hide her furs from Mayte. While Nicole, Sheree, and Shamicka are out, Mayte and Jessica find the fur and decide to make a statement by cooking it, causing all hell to break loose.

programme.title: Hollywood Exes
programme.desc: Now that her prenup is almost settled, Nicole starts to seriously think about planning her wedding and starts searching for the perfect dress. Jessica finds out that Jose has moved away, yet again, causing her to confront him

programme.title: Hollywood Exes
programme.desc: Jessica and Mayte attend a Hollywood party where they run into Jessica's most recent ex, Garth, who is with his new girlfriend. Hoping to reconnect with him, Jessica brings Mayte to his office for a breast implant consultation.

programme.title: Hollywood Exes
programme.desc: Drea celebrates her birthday by teaching the other women how to pole dance. While cheering Shamicka on, Jessica calls her a hood rat, which Sheree confronts her about.

programme.title: Hollywood Exes
programme.desc: The girls head to Vegas to throw a bachelorette party for Nicole however things get out of hand when Mayte compares pole dancing to posing nude for Playboy, which Jessica did several years ago.

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Robbie Rocket takes on Vivian Rivera while Gigi Gianni and Amber Rodriguez prepare to battle Jennifer Florez and Keta Rush in tag team action. Rapping sensation the quick lipped BK Rhythm battles crowd favorite Stephy Slay.

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Tonight's Main Event match is Coach Campanelli and Randi Rah Rah versus Miami's Sweet Heat in a rematch for the WOW Tag Team Championships! Will Sweet Heat retain?

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Let's hope tonight's main event sticks to the rulebook as The Fabulous Four's Enforcer Vickie Lynn McCoy takes on the frog splashing Princess Aussie! We also see the in-person return of Angelica Dante, who we last saw in the attic of the House of Horrors.

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: The World's Greatest Attorney, Sophia Lopez, has a mysterious new tag team to introduce at WOW. Also in action today in what promises to be a hard-hitting, brawl of a match, Reina Del Rey and Wrecking Ball team up to take on The Heavy Metal Sisters.

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Get ready for some rapping as BK Rhythm takes on The Bully Buster, Keta Rush. The Monsters of Madness, Holidead and Voodoo

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: The Islands will erupt tonight when Leia Makoa and Tiki Chamorro join forces with the Tonga Twins to battle the faction of World Champion Penelope Pink

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: The action kicks off with Gigi Gianni vs. the high flying Jennifer Florez. Then, after interference in their singles match, Kandi Krush is teamed with her friend Princess Aussie in tag team action as they look to even the score with Team Exile

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Vickie Lynn McCoy put's the WOW roster on notice that they will have to go through her to get to her Fabulous Four sister, the WOW World Champion Penelope Pink. Can Foxxy Fierce overcome The Enforcer?

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: When Randall has a sheriff bed a prisoner, the man's gang kidnaps the sheriff and two others and threatens to kill one per day until the man is freed.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: In Mexico, Josh is hired to protect a sensible man and his pregnant wife from his father-in-law and the villagers who are angered when he refuses the town healing woman or \\"witch\\".

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: After Josh reluctantly takes the task of finding a man and his wife's pet ewe, he becomes the butt of many jokes in the community while cattlemen nearly hang him when he mentions sheep.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: When a convicted killer escapes prison, Josh is hired for $500 to protect the woman whose testimony put him there.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Josh rides into a town looking for a man who asked him to come there for a job that pays $500.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Josh is hired by Harry Weaver to track down his twin brother Pete, who's wanted with a $500 bounty on him.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Josh is called in to track down a new outlaw - the local sheriff who is a friend.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Josh reluctantly takes a job protecting a beautiful deaf, mute, teenage girl and keeping everyone off the father's place for a day or two.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Josh escorts an East Coast photographer to take a picture of his friend El Gato (The Cat), who is a famous, hilarious bandit living in the hills of Mexico with a small army.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: A broke Josh is hired by a fearful man to help him elope with his sweetheart, Jane, the daughter of a local rancher.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Josh takes a job for $200 protecting an express office employee who stole $10,000 and wants to return it before it's discovered missing.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: A Japanese woman travels to the U.S. to find an American man who proposed to her in Japan and hires Josh to find him since no one will help her in her search.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Josh arrives in town thinking the sheriff summoned him to go after a man.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Josh rides to Barney Durant's horse business to rent a couple of horses right after Barney pushes his son David to leave.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: While pursuing Carl Martin, Josh stops at a marshal's office where Carl is being held.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: When phony wanted posters put a price on the head of a retired Confederate officer, Colonel Sykes' daughter summons Josh Randall to help keep the bounty hunters at bay.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: A reclusive old man with an Apache bodyguard is wanted for a crime committed long ago.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: A ranch manager hires Randall to bring back a line rider charged with grand theft.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Randall is rooked into advancing half the bounty to a man who promises to lead him to the wanted criminal Shawnee Bill, but Bill may be closer than Randall thinks.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: A banker with a consuming thirst for vengeance hires Randall to accompany him to track down the man he believes responsible for his son's death and a bank robbery.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Randall is deputized to transport a ruthless killer to Tucson but exchanges him for the nun kidnapped by the killer's gang.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Randall brings a suspected murderer to Pot Hole but fears the man won't receive a fair trial when he finds the townspeople in the grip of a power-mad bully.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: When Josh, as a favor to a friend, escorts a beautiful woman to a trial that could see her hang for killing her husband, her lover, and a foreman, she charms him to convince her of her innocenences.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Josh is asked by Stacy Torrance for help when she finds a wanted poster under her door - for her for murder.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Owing a favor to a sheriff, Josh agrees against better judgment to go to the lawless town of Bent Horn to bring back a man wanted for bank robbery and murder.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Josh sets out to help a heartbroken wife locate her missing husband, but his mission of mercy meets with a resistant and tight-lipped townspeople.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
